markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Debrief the Udemy QBR and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Udemy Renewal Risk:** Steph's questioning of agency value (vs. internal capabilities) puts renewal at \~50%. We must proactively address this by reframing our value proposition.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [**Value Prop Pivot:** Shift the narrative from simple content creation to strategic partnership, emphasizing our speed of learning and ability to drive multi-channel impact (e.g., social, sales enablement).](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Handoff Plan:** Carly will become the Udemy engagement manager to lighten Katya's workload before her April leave.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [**Other Client Updates:** Monograph is open to a PSEO upsell, and Kyle is drafting Webstacks' V1 strategy for tomorrow's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)

## Topics

### Udemy QBR Debrief

  - [The QBR was constructive, but Steph's feedback signals a renewal risk.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [**Core Concern:** Steph questioned the agency's value, asking if Udemy's internal team could replicate our work.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [**Katya's Interpretation:** Steph wants "flashier optimizations" beyond basic article generation, possibly including video.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**Kyle's Interpretation:** The concern is about our strategic contribution vs. execution. The key is demonstrating value beyond content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Reporting Challenge:** Udemy's focus on broad campaigns (not channel-specific metrics) complicates showing SEO ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This approach simplifies the narrative for a large organization, but it risks overlooking evergreen SEO opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** We can lead on evergreen strategy and support point-in-time campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)

### Udemy Value Proposition Pivot

  - [**Goal:** Proactively address Steph's concerns to secure renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Reframe our value proposition to highlight strategic partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Speed of Learning:** Faster signal → faster adaptation → better results.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
      - [**Multi-Channel Impact:** Content drives value beyond SEO traffic (e.g., social, sales enablement).](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [**Internal Sync:** Katya to meet with Andy for feedback on the "communicating value" framework.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [**Client Outreach:** Deliver a lightweight document to Steph outlining our strategic value, followed by a check-in call.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)

### Udemy Handoff & Reporting

  - [Carly will become the Udemy engagement manager to manage Katya's workload before her April leave.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Katya will send Steph a QBR recap (PDF slides + strategy link).](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [The new strategy will be integrated into the Content OS after Justin's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)

### Other Client Updates

  - [**Monograph:**](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
      - [**Context:** CEO Robert wants to see "flashier" results beyond the current 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** The client is open to a PSEO upsell (e.g., state-specific content), which Allison (marketing) believes Robert would support.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [**Webstacks:**](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
      - [**Context:** Jesse (client) has gone silent on Gong calls, limiting qualitative feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
      - [**Action:** Kyle is drafting the V1 strategy based on research for tomorrow's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
      - [**Idea:** Propose a content/video synergy where our research informs videos created by Webstacks.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [**Anything:**](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
      - [**PSEO:** Kyle is incorporating Drew's feedback on mobile and coordinating internal complexity.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
      - [**Reporting:** Content traffic is down, but the "create XYZ" section is growing. Kyle will create a Loom tutorial on the unique GSC reporting process.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [Send Udemy QBR recap to Steph (PDF slides + strategy link).](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [Meet with Andy for feedback on the "communicating value" framework.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [Coordinate the Udemy handoff with Carly.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [Draft the Monograph PSEO upsell proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
      - [Present the Webstacks V1 strategy tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
      - [Send lead reporting examples (Webstacks, Monograph) to Kyle for review.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [Draft the lightweight document on Udemy's strategic value.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [Finalize the Webstacks V1 strategy draft for tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
      - [Create the Loom tutorial for Anything's GSC reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/6BybRN2vLtR9zrigHhgm6TTfKo-2jUa9?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
